---
description: "Use when: running unit tests, writing test cases, designing test coverage, debugging failing tests, backend MSTest tests, frontend Vitest tests, verifying test results, checking coverage reports"
argument-hint: "Optional: specify test scope (backend/frontend/all) or test file/path"
---

# Run and Write Unit Tests

Execute or author unit tests for backend (.NET MSTest) or frontend (Angular Vitest) components. Verify test coverage and debug failing tests.

**This task will:**
- Run appropriate test framework (MSTest for backend, Vitest for frontend)
- Verify test coverage meets standards
- Debug failing tests
- Ensure infrastructure and prerequisites are ready

Refer to [unit-tests.instructions.md](../instructions/unit-tests.instructions.md) for detailed testing procedures and best practices.
